behavior_in_task_description.reason: instruction.md names all files (submit.ts, dependency.ts, Blocks.svelte, constants.ts), variable names (is_connection_error, connection_lost, on_connection_lost_cb, reconnect_interval, handle_connection_lost), and constants (BROKEN_CONNECTION_MSG, LOST_CONNECTION_MESSAGE) tested.

no_solution_leakage.reason: instruction.md explicitly specifies variable names like 'is_connection_error', 'connection_lost', 'on_connection_lost_cb', 'reconnect_interval', and 'handle_connection_lost' rather than describing the bug behaviorally; this essentially names the fix's implementation details.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests assert exact identifier names (is_connection_error, connection_lost, on_connection_lost_cb, reconnect_interval, handle_connection_lost) via regex, so alternative correct fixes using different names would fail even though behavior is equivalent.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests run Node.js subprocesses but only readFileSync and regex-match source code patterns (e.g., /connection_lost\s*[=:]\s*false/, /setInterval\s*\(/); no code is imported/executed behaviorally.

test_not_tautological.reason: A stub that doesn't implement the fix would fail the regex checks for connection_lost=false init, result.broken handling, dispatch early return, setInterval, reconnect(), and location.reload().

behavior_in_tests.reason: Each listed Verification Criteria item (is_connection_error, broken flag, connection_lost init, dispatch short-circuit, result.broken check, callback, handle_connection_lost, setInterval/reconnect/reload, reconnect_interval, clearInterval) has a corresponding test assertion.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are named descriptively (test_submit_broken_flag_logic, test_dispatch_short_circuits_on_connection_lost, etc.) with a 'Fail-to-pass' section header comment.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task is a code fix, not a structured data producer.

no_typos.reason: Filenames and identifiers in instruction.md match those referenced in tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: instruction.md prescribes exact variable/function names ('named connection_lost', 'named on_connection_lost_cb', 'function named handle_connection_lost', 'variable named reconnect_interval'), eliminating localization/naming decisions that should be part of the fix.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Code-only task, no config edits involved.
